title: angelonia procumbens
intro: Angelonia procumbens, also known as Angel's Tears or False Dragonhead, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Angelonia procumbens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
